hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *product-context.yaml) if [[ "$PWD" == */.feature-workspaces/* ]]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CONCURRENCY PROTOCOL: Workspace sessions must not write to product-context.yaml. Write to .dev-workflow/signals/status.json instead. Only the main session (via /wrap, /dispatch, /reflect) updates the YAML."}}'; fi ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if [[ "$PWD" == */.feature-workspaces/* ]] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+(add|commit).*product-context\.yaml'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CONCURRENCY PROTOCOL: Workspace sessions must not commit product-context.yaml. Write to .dev-workflow/signals/status.json instead."}}'; fi; }
